passes.title: American Heritage Museum
passes.benefit_text: This is a Day Membership pass which allows two people to visit the Boston Athenaeum during operating hours at no cost. Pass holders are welcome to experience the Athenaeum as a member for a day, enjoy access to 12 floors of inviting spaces, with WiFi, well-lit work tables, cozy nooks, and beautiful city views.
source_phrases: This is a Day Membership pass which allows two people to visit the Boston Athenaeum during operating hours at no cost. Pass holders are welcome to experience the Athenaeum as a member for a day, enjoy access to 12 floors of inviting spaces, with WiFi, well-lit work tables, cozy nooks, and beautiful city views.

passes.title: Boston Athenaeum
passes.benefit_text: Half price admission for up to four people
source_phrases: Half price admission for up to four people

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits 4 guests at $5 off per person.
source_phrases: Each pass admits 4 guests at $5 off per person.

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits up to 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person ($9.50 per person); any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. Children under one year of age are admitted free.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person ($9.50 per person); any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. Children under one year of age are admitted free.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: BENEFITS

Library Passes are $10 per ticket (discounted from the regular fee of $20 per ticket). One library pass will be valid for up to two admission tickets at the discounted price. Current pricing and visitor information: https://www.icaboston.org/visit
Patrons under the age of 18 are free without the pass.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
- Each pass admits up to 4 adults for $5 each (General Admission only).
- Children under 18 are admitted for free.
source_phrases: - Each pass admits up to 4 adults for $5 each (General Admission only).
- Children under 18 are admitted for free.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: This Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary at $2.00 per person over the age of two.
source_phrases: This Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary at $2.00 per person over the age of two.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
passes.benefit_text: -Pass valid for free parking for one passenger vehicle at over 50 MA State Parks that charge a parking fee.
source_phrases: -Pass valid for free parking for one passenger vehicle at over 50 MA State Parks that charge a parking fee.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
source_phrases: Each pass allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each.  Children 0-6 years of age are admitted free.
Promo codes and library passes are not applicable toward discounts on shopping, parking, dining, films, concerts, lectures, courses, or any other public programs.
All prices are subject to change. Discount admission may not be combined with other offers.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text: *This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
source_phrases: *This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
New England Aquarium Academic Year Pass Program - Sept.- May 22  -This pass allows 4 people (adult, senior, child, college)admittance to aquarium at 50% off per ticket .Children under three years of age are admitted free.- Valid only for Aquarium admission.- This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
New England Aquarium Summer Pass Program- May 26- Sept. 4  - pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, college) at $20.00 each. Chlidren under three years of age are admitted free. This pass is valid on weekdays only .
source_phrases: New England Aquarium Academic Year Pass Program - Sept.- May 22  -This pass allows 4 people (adult, senior, child, college)admittance to aquarium at 50% off per ticket .Children under three years of age are admitted free.- Valid only for Aquarium admission.- This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.

New England Aquarium Summer Pass Program- May 26- Sept. 4  - pass admits up to four people (adult, senior, child, college) at $20.00 each. Chlidren under three years of age are admitted free. This pass is valid on weekdays only .

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: This pass allows admittance for two guests at 50% off the general admission price.
source_phrases: This pass allows admittance for two guests at 50% off the general admission price.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text: Each pass admits 2 adults and up to 4 youth at half-price admission
source_phrases: Each pass admits 2 adults and up to 4 youth at half-price admission

passes.title: Orchard House
passes.benefit_text: Each pass allows admission for 2 people for $12.00 per person Thursday through Mondays.
source_phrases: Each pass allows admission for 2 people for $12.00 per person Thursday through Mondays.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: Pass valid for admission for up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child at the Franklin Park Zoo and Stone Zoo.
source_phrases: Pass valid for admission for up to 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child at the Franklin Park Zoo and Stone Zoo.
